sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89805" key="prosoi/khsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσοίκ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89805.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dwelling near</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:25:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.25.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
